summary: Command Center Feature - COMPLETE. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI components verified. The Command Center aggregates 5 AI intelligence layers: Fleet Safety Score (83 Stable), Predictive Alerts (15), Risk Forecast Highlights (6 HIGH windows), Twin Evolution Shifts (0 detected), and Active Incidents (20). All panels render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Navigation and interactions work correctly.

issues: Initial page load takes ~20 seconds due to fleet safety score computation for 9 devices. This is expected behavior as noted in the requirements.

TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_command_center_returns_200: PASS - Returns 200 OK for operator in ~20s
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_response_structure_has_all_sections: PASS - Contains generated_at, fleet_safety, predictive_alerts, forecast_highlights, evolution_shifts, active_incidents, counts
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_fleet_safety_structure: PASS - Contains fleet_score, fleet_status, device_count, status_breakdown, devices
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_fleet_devices_array_structure: PASS - Each device has device_id, device_identifier, safety_score, status
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_predictive_alerts_structure: PASS - Each alert has device_identifier, prediction_type, score, explanation
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_forecast_highlights_structure: PASS - Each highlight has device_identifier, bucket, risk_score, risk_level, reason
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_evolution_shifts_structure: PASS - Empty list when no shifts detected (valid)
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_active_incidents_structure: PASS - Each incident has id, device_identifier, severity, status, escalation_level
TestCommandCenterEndpoint.test_counts_object_structure: PASS - Contains predictive_alerts, high_risk_windows, evolution_shifts, active_incidents, critical_devices

TestCommandCenterRBAC.test_guardian_gets_403: PASS - Guardian role correctly gets 403 Forbidden

TestCommandCenterDataContent.test_forecast_risk_levels_valid: PASS - All 12 highlights have HIGH or MEDIUM risk levels
TestCommandCenterDataContent.test_incident_severity_levels_valid: PASS - All 20 incidents have valid severity

navigation.command_center_nav_link: PASS - data-testid='op-nav-command-center' found in sidebar with Brain icon

header.title: PASS - 'Nagarik Command Center' header with Brain icon
header.subtitle: PASS - 'Unified intelligence — what happened, what will happen, what is deteriorating'

fleet_safety_panel.device_entries: PASS - Each device shows score, identifier, and status badge (data-testid='cc-device-{id}')

active_incidents_panel.incident_entries: PASS - 20 incidents displayed with severity badges and escalation levels (data-testid='cc-incident-{id}')

predictive_alerts_panel.alert_entries: PASS - 15 alerts displayed with prediction type, score percentage, explanation (data-testid='cc-alert-{id}')

risk_forecast_panel.forecast_entries: PASS - 12 entries with bucket (Morning, Afternoon, etc.), time range, risk score (data-testid='cc-forecast-{id}-{bucket}')

evolution_shifts_panel.empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No behavioral shifts detected' message (expected)

footer.generated_timestamp: PASS - Shows 'Generated {date} — Aggregating 9 devices across 9 AI layers'

interactions.view_all_incidents_navigation: PASS - View All button navigates to /operator/incidents
interactions.refresh_button_functionality: PASS - Refresh button fetches fresh data

critical_code_review_comments: Backend get_command_center endpoint correctly aggregates data from 5 sources: safety_scores, predictive_risks, risk_forecasts, twin_evolution_snapshots, and incidents
Backend uses efficient SQL queries with proper JOINs and limits (15 alerts, 15 forecasts, 20 incidents)
Backend correctly filters: predictive alerts >= 0.5 score, forecast highlights HIGH/MEDIUM within 30 min TTL
Backend evolution_shifts computation correctly detects declines using thresholds (-20% for movement/active_hours/signal, -15% for battery)
Backend RBAC properly enforced via require_role('operator', 'admin') dependency
Frontend CommandCenter.jsx correctly renders all 5 panels with proper data-testid attributes
Frontend uses efficient React patterns: useCallback for fetchData, conditional rendering for empty states
Frontend properly displays loading state with cc-loading indicator during initial fetch
Frontend correctly handles empty states for each panel (No active predictive alerts, No behavioral shifts, etc.)
Frontend navigation works correctly - devices link to device-health, incidents link to incidents page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Command Center feature fully tested. The endpoint GET /api/operator/command-center takes ~20s on first load due to fleet safety score computation for 9 devices. Data verified: fleet_score=83 (Stable), 9 devices (7 excellent, 2 attention: DEV-001=50, DEV-002=53), 20 active incidents (mostly critical), 15 predictive alerts, 6 HIGH risk forecast windows, 0 evolution shifts. All data-testid attributes work correctly. Frontend renders at /operator/command-center with proper navigation from sidebar using Brain icon.
